examples: Special solvents can be used to decarbonize and desulfurize waste catalysts to replace the high-temperature roasting pretreatment process.
We'd have to keep geoengineering indefinitely to balance out continued greenhouse-gas emissions, and the motivation to decarbonize might disappear if we believed we had an insurance policy.
Global greenhouse gas emissions have skyrocketed over the past few decades on the back of relatively cheap oil, but as the price rises, it pays to decarbonize, and the climate will benefit.
Design: How do we reduce the use of material (dematerialize) and impact to the environment (decarbonize)?
